return(function(J,r,u,l,G,x,v,A,s,X,b,d,U,K,Z,T,z,y,c,D,R,H,S,j)X,D,K,b,S,A,Z,c,T,s,d,y,H,j,U,z,R=function(J,n)local r=Z(n)local u=function()return R(J,{},n,r)end return u end,function(J,n)local
